subcodes.first_line: A Book We have sent down in truth and made it a sign from Our presence unto them that dwell in the heavens and on the earth. There is none other God but He [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزلناه بالحق و جعلناه آیه من لدنا لمن فی السموات و الارض لا اله الا هو
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @prophecy and fulfillment, @exhortations and counsels, @station of the Manifestation of God
